ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "listing_url" TEXT /* URL of the listing */,
  "scrape_id" TEXT /* Scraping identifier for data collection */,
  "last_scraped" TEXT /* Date the listing was last scraped */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the listing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the listing */,
  "neighborhood_overview" TEXT /* Overview of the neighborhood */,
  "picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the listing's primary picture */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the listing */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the property */,
  "instant_bookable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the listing is available for instant booking */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., entire home, private room, shared space) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "accommodates" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON array of amenities available in the property */,
  "price_per_night" TEXT /* Price per night for the listing */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for a booking */,
  "maximum_nights" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights allowed for a booking */,
  "availability_start_date" TEXT /* Date from which the listing is available */,
  "availability_end_date" TEXT /* Date until which the listing is available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the listing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the listing was last updated */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_url" TEXT /* URL of the host's profile */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Total number of listings by the host */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count_entire_homes" INTEGER /* Number of entire homes listed by the host */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count_private_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of private rooms listed by the host */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count_shared_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of shared rooms listed by the host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "host_email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "host_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "host_address" TEXT /* Address of the host */,
  "host_bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the host */,
  "host_profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the host's profile picture */,
  "host_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the host is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the host account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the host account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "review_scores_communication" INTEGER /* Score for communication given by the reviewer */,
  "review_scores_location" INTEGER /* Score for location given by the reviewer */,
  "review_scores_value" INTEGER /* Score for value given by the reviewer */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews received per month */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "cleanliness_score" INTEGER /* Score for cleanliness given by the reviewer */,
  "accuracy_score" INTEGER /* Score for accuracy of the listing description */,
  "check_in_score" INTEGER /* Score for the check-in process */,
  "value_score" INTEGER /* Score for value given by the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview description of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region where the neighborhood is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the neighborhood is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the neighborhood */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the neighborhood was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the neighborhood was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_code" TEXT /* Code of the license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the license expires */,
  "issued_by" TEXT /* Authority that issued the license */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the license record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the license record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instant_bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing available for instant booking */,
  "is_instant_bookable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the booking is instant */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the instant booking was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the instant booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instant booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instant booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instant_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instant_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., host, guest, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the listing */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the listing was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, book) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the listing */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the listing */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was made */,
  "search_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the search (e.g., location, price range) */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  "search_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the search query in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the search was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
